{{Quote|We have friends among the Dur Sabon who will protect her. Can you get her to them?|[[Foolookoola]]'s uncle, to [[Vilmarh Grahrk]]|<ref name="Deal" />}}
The '''Dur Sabon''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of tall, [[Eel/Legends|eel]]-like [[Sentience/Legends|sentients]] native to the [[Dur Sabon|planet of the same name]].<ref name="Deal" /><ref name="CSWE" />

Around [[33 BBY]],<ref name="NEGC">''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]''</ref> [[Princess/Legends|princess]] [[Foolookoola]] arrived on Dur Sabon as part of a covert operation, having been forced to flee the neighboring planet of [[Ootoola]] after her relatives were murdered by the [[Revolutionary Purist Council|conspirators]]. Friends of the overthrown [[Royal family of Ootoola|royal family]] took the young Foolookoola in and expressed hope that she would one day be able to return home safely.<ref name="Deal" />

==Appearances==
*{{Tales|3|Deal with a Demon}} {{1st}}
